name: PENTeam Mathematical Research
description: MCP configuration for multi-agent mathematical research team

filesystem.description: File system access for project directories

decision_record.description: Decision records requiring Project Owner approval

context_templates.project_intake: Read project description from /app/input/{project}.md and initialize project structure
context_templates.task_assignment: Assign task to {agent} with context from /app/communication/threads/{project}/
context_templates.decision_escalation: Create decision record in /app/decisions/pending/{project}/ for Project Owner review
